ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the town where the property is located */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university associated with the property */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property type */,
  "sale_amount" INTEGER /* Sale amount of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "baths" REAL /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "sqft_home" INTEGER /* Square footage of the home */,
  "sqft_lot" REAL /* Square footage of the lot */,
  "build_year" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the property */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., Available, Sold, Under Contract) */,
  "property_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the property */,
  "property_features" TEXT /* Additional features of the property (e.g., pool, garage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_town_id FOREIGN KEY ("town_id") REFERENCES towns ("town_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "towns" (
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each town */,
  "town_name" TEXT /* Name of the town */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the town is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the town */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the town */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the town */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Current enrollment of the university */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the university */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the university's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "min_sqft" INTEGER /* Minimum square footage for the property type */,
  "max_sqft" INTEGER /* Maximum square footage for the property type */,
  "avg_price" REAL /* Average price for the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "sale_amount" INTEGER /* Sale amount of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who made the sale */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer (if available) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission earned by the agent on the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the agent */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales made by the agent */,
  "total_commission" REAL /* Total commission earned by the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being listed */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent listing the property */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed */,
  "listing_price" INTEGER /* Listing price of the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the listing (e.g., Active, Sold, Withdrawn) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the listing was last updated */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made to the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role (to reference a roles table) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., agent, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type */,
  "town_id" INTEGER /* ID of the town */,
  "average_sale_price" REAL /* Average sale price of properties in the town */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales in the town */,
  "total_listings" INTEGER /* Total number of listings in the town */,
  "average_listing_price" REAL /* Average listing price in the town */,
  "sales_growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of sales over the time period */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the analytics data (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly, Yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_town_id FOREIGN KEY ("town_id") REFERENCES towns ("town_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id")
)
